summary: Iteration 4 focused smoke: verified ₹ rendering across Orders/Dashboard/Payments (no literal '$' leaks) and Business Profile persistence. Backend PUT /api/business/profile correctly persists all fields (verified via curl GET after PUT). Frontend UI: Orders list rows render ₹192.50/₹2039.04/etc cleanly, new-order dialog shows Subtotal/Tax/Total as ₹0.00, Payments page loads with ₹4,000 received & UPI method visible. Business Profile page loaded with pre-populated values, Save profile click showed toast 'Business profile saved', reload preserved all fields (business_name=BusinessFlow HQ IN, industry=Retail, phone=+919999900000, address=MG Road Bengaluru, tax_id=TAX-IN-9999, currency=INR). Topbar shows 'BUSINESSFLOW HQ' — the user.business_name from auth, NOT the updated business_profile.business_name — minor inconsistency worth noting.
passed: PUT /api/business/profile → 200 persists business_name=BusinessFlow HQ IN, currency=INR, all fields
Orders page: 0 '$' hits, 0 '₹$' hits — all totals render as ₹NNN.NN
New-order dialog: Subtotal ₹0.00 / Tax ₹0.00 / Total ₹0.00 — clean
Dashboard KPIs render ₹8,963.18 / ₹2,223.18 and chart Y-axis shows ₹0..₹6000
Business Profile Save shows 'Business profile saved' toast
Business Profile values persist across full page reload (verified via input values after reload)
Payments page loads: ₹4,000 received, 2 UPI transactions shown, no '$' leaks

failed.issue: Topbar shows 'BUSINESSFLOW HQ' (user.business_name from auth object) instead of the updated 'BusinessFlow HQ IN' from business profile. The topbar does not reflect the newly-saved business_name from /api/business/profile.
failed.evidence: After saving business_name='BusinessFlow HQ IN' and reloading, topbar text still reads 'BUSINESSFLOW HQ'. Business profile page shows updated value correctly.

failed.issue: innerText scan returned 5 '$' hits on dashboard: ['$48,290','$18,441','$0','$0','$29']. Visible UI shows only ₹. These likely come from off-screen/hidden elements (possibly Emergent overlay/badge tooltip) — not visible to user in screenshot, but present in DOM.
failed.evidence: Screenshot shows only ₹ values; text scan surfaces '$' from hidden/overlay text.

action_items: Consider updating topbar workspace indicator to read from business_profile.business_name (or refresh user.business_name after PUT) so it reflects the saved value.
Optional: audit dashboard DOM for the 5 '$'-value strings ($48,290 / $18,441 / $29) to confirm they are truly hidden marketing/badge text and not user-facing.
